accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurate context (CRA authority, EPA rule, Federal Register citation, no amendment to underlying statute) is verified correct.

no_hallucinations.why: The Congressional Review Act reference and statutory-context statements are accurate real-world context, not fabrications.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the resolution nullifies the EPA Waste Emissions Charge rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: It correctly explains the rule is voided and notes the underlying authorizing statute is not amended.

exceptions_conditions.why: A CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly states the resolution took effect upon approval on March 14, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: It captures the sole operative effect: disapproval and voiding of the specified rule.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and internally consistent.

concise.why: It is appropriately brief with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: EPA, the rule title, and the Congressional Review Act are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 91094), publication date, and approval date are all correct.
